full_text:
Cao Gun 曹袞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Gun (曹袞)was born in Pei. Noted for his scholarship and quiet conduct. Wrote essays when young. Cao Gun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Gun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
